caption: The video appears to be an animated or illustrated depiction of a naval vessel, likely a warship, with a focus on its missile systems. The frames highlight specific areas of the ship, particularly the missile launchers and their corresponding missiles. The top part of the image shows a side view of the ship with a red box outlining the missile launcher, while the bottom part provides a top-down view of the same area, also enclosed in a red box. In the upper right corner, there is a close-up illustration of the missile itself, indicating the type of weapon being discussed. The video seems to be educational or informative, possibly explaining the design, function, or capabilities of the ship's missile system. The "13 kanal" logo suggests it might be from a news or documentary channel.
